pr_created: feat(fv): add CT4b + CT5b proved theorems — closer A4 path (Tasks 5 & 9)

concrete_transitions.note: CT1-CT3 + CT4b + CT5b proved (5 proved). CT4+CT5 sorry. CT6 proved via CT1. hlc_from_hae (CT5b) is the key new result: hae directly gives HLogConsistency.

remaining_sorries.CT4: lmi_preserved_single_step: single AE step preserves LMI (hard, full global model needed)
remaining_sorries.CT5: candLogMatching_of_broadcast: broadcast => CandLogMatching (needs global state model)

a4_gap_status: CT4b+CT5b provide clean inductive structure. Remaining gap: prove initial CandLogMatching from election + valid AE broadcasts satisfy hprev+hnew preconditions of CT4b.
toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, use 'theorem' not 'lemma', stdlib only. simp [hw] (not subst hw) for w=v case split when v is a parameter.
lean_proof_notes: CRITICAL: subst hw where hw:w=v eliminates v (param) not w (intro'd) in some cases. Use simp only [hw] to rewrite w->v without subst.
next_priority_targets: A4 complete: prove CT5 by adding initial CandLogMatching hypothesis from election model
new_type_note: simp only [hw] (hw:w=v) correctly beta-reduces lambda and simplifies if-then-else in Lean 4.28 stdlib.
